parameter.name: commit-standards
parameter.usage: All sessions produce a commit. Apply before every git commit.

parameters.parameter: All sessions produce a commit. Write for both human readers and downstream LLM agents consuming commits as gitContext. Types: feat|fix|refactor|chore|docs|test|perf|plan Body bullets: intent/decisions · contracts or schemas changed · trade-offs rejected · breaking changes. Plan sessions: emphasize decisions made and options rejected. Code sessions: surface schema/contract changes explicitly. Every bullet must carry signal. Omit filler.
